# @ramiidv/arca-common

> Shared TypeScript utilities for the ARCA (formerly AFIP) SDK ecosystem.
> Foundation library used by @ramiidv/arca-facturacion, @ramiidv/arca-padron, @ramiidv/arca-empleados, etc.

## What this package provides

- WSAA authentication client (CMS/PKCS#7 signing, token caching, request deduplication)
- Generic SOAP client with retry, timeout, and exponential backoff
- XML parsing/building utilities (via fast-xml-parser)
- Error class hierarchy for all ARCA SDKs
- CUIL/CUIT and CBU validators with checksum verification
- Date validation utilities
- Shared TypeScript types and constants

## Install

```bash
npm install @ramiidv/arca-common
```

Requires Node.js >= 18. Uses native `fetch` (no axios/node-fetch dependency).

## Architecture

```
src/
  index.ts        — re-exports everything
  wsaa.ts         — WsaaClient class (WSAA authentication)
  soap-client.ts  — SOAP call functions and XML utilities
  errors.ts       — error class hierarchy
  validators.ts   — CUIL/CUIT, CBU, date validators
  types.ts        — shared TypeScript interfaces
  constants.ts    — WSAA endpoints, DocTipo, Provincia enums
```

Dependencies:
- `fast-xml-parser` (^5.0.0) — XML parsing and building
- `node-forge` (^1.3.0) — CMS/PKCS#7 signing for WSAA

## Exported classes

### WsaaClient

WSAA (Web Service de Autenticacion y Autorizacion) client. Handles TRA creation, CMS/PKCS#7 signing, login, and token caching.

```typescript
import { WsaaClient } from "@ramiidv/arca-common";

const wsaa = new WsaaClient({
  cert: string,               // X.509 certificate PEM
  key: string,                // RSA private key PEM
  production?: boolean,       // Default: false (testing/homologacion)
  endpoint?: string,          // Custom WSAA URL (overrides production flag)
  tokenTTLMinutes?: number,   // Default: 720 (12 hours)
  timeout?: number,           // Default: 30000ms
  retries?: number,           // Default: 1
  retryDelayMs?: number,      // Default: 1000ms (exponential backoff)
  onEvent?: (event: ArcaEvent) => void,
});
```

Methods:
- `getAccessTicket(service: string): Promise<AccessTicket>` — get auth ticket (cached + deduped)
- `clearTicket(service: string): void` — invalidate cached ticket for a service
- `clearAllTickets(): void` — invalidate all cached tickets

Token caching: tickets are cached in memory by service name. A 2-minute safety margin is applied before expiry. Concurrent login requests for the same service are deduplicated (only one actual SOAP call).

### Error classes

All extend `ArcaError` which extends `Error`.

```typescript
class ArcaError extends Error { name: "ArcaError" }

class ArcaAuthError extends ArcaError { name: "ArcaAuthError" }
// Thrown when: WSAA login fails, certificate is invalid, unexpected WSAA response

class ArcaSoapError extends ArcaError {
  name: "ArcaSoapError";
  statusCode?: number;  // HTTP status code if available
}
// Thrown when: HTTP request fails, timeout, SOAP Fault received

class ArcaServiceError extends ArcaError {
  name: "ArcaServiceError";
  errors: { code: number; msg: string }[];
}
// Thrown when: ARCA web service returns business errors (e.g. invalid CUIT, rejected invoice)

class ArcaValidationError extends ArcaError {
  name: "ArcaValidationError";
  field?: string;
  details: ValidationErrorDetail[];  // { field: string; message: string; value?: unknown }
}
// Thrown when: input data fails validation (invalid CUIL format, bad CBU checksum, etc.)
```

## Exported functions

### SOAP client (soap-client.ts)

```typescript
// Low-level SOAP call. Builds envelope, sends via fetch with AbortController timeout,
// parses XML response. Retries on 5xx and network errors with exponential backoff.
function soapCall(
  endpoint: string,
  bodyContent: string,       // Raw XML to place inside <soapenv:Body>
  opts?: SoapCallOptions,
): Promise<Record<string, unknown>>;

// High-level SOAP call for ARCA web services.
// Builds namespaced method body, sets SOAPAction, calls soapCall,
// extracts {method}Response/{method}Result from the response.
// Detects SOAP Faults and throws ArcaSoapError.
function afipSoapCall(
  endpoint: string,
  namespace: string,         // e.g. "http://ar.gov.afip.dif.FEV1/"
  method: string,            // e.g. "FECAESolicitar"
  params: Record<string, unknown>,
  opts?: SoapCallOptions,
): Promise<Record<string, unknown>>;

// Checks if ARCA response contains business errors (Errors/Err nodes).
// Throws ArcaServiceError if errors found.
function checkServiceErrors(result: Record<string, unknown>, serviceName: string): void;

// Parse XML string to JS object
function parseXml(xml: string): Record<string, unknown>;

// Build XML string from JS object
function buildXml(obj: Record<string, unknown>): string;

// Normalize value/array/undefined to array.
// Useful for SOAP responses where single elements aren't wrapped in arrays.
function ensureArray<T>(val: T | T[] | undefined | null): T[];

// Try multiple keys on an object, return first match.
// Useful for SOAP responses where namespace prefixes vary.
function getNestedValue(obj: Record<string, unknown>, ...keys: string[]): unknown;
```

### Validators (validators.ts)

```typescript
// CUIT/CUIL — accepts string ("XX-XXXXXXXX-X", "XXXXXXXXXXX") or number

// Validates CUIT format and Módulo 11 check digit.
// Returns normalized 11-digit string. Throws ArcaValidationError if invalid.
function validateCuit(cuit: string | number): string;

// Non-throwing boolean check. Returns true if valid, false otherwise.
function isValidCuit(cuit: string | number): boolean;

// Remove hyphens, convert number to string. Returns 11 digits.
function normalizeCuit(cuit: string | number): string;

// Format as "XX-XXXXXXXX-X". Accepts string or number.
function formatCuit(cuit: string | number): string;

// Backward-compatible aliases (same functions):
const validateCuil = validateCuit;
const normalizeCuil = normalizeCuit;
const formatCuil = formatCuit;

// CBU (22-digit Argentine bank account number)

// Validates format + block 1/block 2 checksums. Throws ArcaValidationError.
function validateCBU(cbu: string): string;

// Non-throwing boolean check.
function isValidCBU(cbu: string): boolean;

// Dates (AFIP format)

// Format Date or string to YYYYMMDD (AFIP standard). Uses Argentina timezone (UTC-3).
// Passes through YYYYMMDD strings. Parses ISO strings.
function formatDate(date: Date | string): string;

// Parse YYYYMMDD or YYYY-MM-DD string to Date.
function parseAfipDate(dateStr: string): Date;

// Validate that a Date object is valid. Throws ArcaValidationError if not.
function validateFecha(date: Date, fieldName: string): void;

// Validate that fechaFin is after fechaInicio. Throws ArcaValidationError if not.
function validateFechaRango(fechaInicio: Date, fechaFin: Date | undefined): void;

// Error collection helpers (for SDK authors building validators)

// Run a validation function and collect errors into an array instead of throwing.
function collectErrors(fn: () => void, errors: ValidationErrorDetail[]): void;

// Like collectErrors but prefixes field names in collected errors.
function collectErrorsWithPrefix(fn: () => void, errors: ValidationErrorDetail[], prefix: string): void;
```

## Exported types (types.ts)

```typescript
interface AccessTicket {
  token: string;
  sign: string;
  expirationTime: Date;
}

interface ArcaBaseConfig {
  cert: string;                               // X.509 certificate PEM
  key: string;                                // Private key PEM
  production?: boolean;                       // Default: false
  timeout?: number;                           // Default: 30000ms
  retries?: number;                           // Default: 1
  retryDelayMs?: number;                      // Default: 1000ms
  onEvent?: (event: ArcaEvent) => void;
}

interface SoapCallOptions {
  timeout?: number;                           // Default: 30000ms
  retries?: number;                           // Default: 1
  retryDelayMs?: number;                      // Default: 1000ms
  soapAction?: string;
  onEvent?: (event: ArcaEvent) => void;
  methodName?: string;                        // For event reporting
}

interface ServerStatus {
  appserver: string;
  dbserver: string;
  authserver: string;
}

// Discriminated union of SDK events
type ArcaEvent =
  | { type: "auth:login"; service: string; durationMs?: number }
  | { type: "auth:cache-hit"; service: string }
  | { type: "request:start"; method: string; endpoint: string }
  | { type: "request:end"; method: string; endpoint: string; durationMs: number }
  | { type: "request:retry"; method: string; endpoint: string; attempt: number; error: Error | string }
  | { type: "request:error"; method: string; endpoint: string; error: Error | string };

interface WsaaClientConfig {
  cert: string;
  key: string;
  production?: boolean;
  endpoint?: string;
  tokenTTLMinutes?: number;                   // Default: 720
  timeout?: number;                           // Default: 30000
  retries?: number;                           // Default: 1
  retryDelayMs?: number;                      // Default: 1000
  onEvent?: (event: ArcaEvent) => void;
}

interface ValidationErrorDetail {
  field: string;
  message: string;
  value?: unknown;
}
```

## Exported constants (constants.ts)

```typescript
const WSAA_ENDPOINTS = {
  testing: "https://wsaahomo.afip.gov.ar/ws/services/LoginCms",
  production: "https://wsaa.afip.gov.ar/ws/services/LoginCms",
} as const;

const WSAA_NAMESPACE = "http://wsaa.view.sua.dvadac.desein.afip.gov";

enum DocTipo {
  CUIT = 80,
  CUIL = 86,
  CDI = 87,
  LE = 89,
  LC = 90,
  CI_EXTRANJERA = 91,
  EN_TRAMITE = 92,
  ACTA_NACIMIENTO = 93,
  PASAPORTE = 94,
  CI_BS_AS_RNP = 95,
  DNI = 96,
  CONSUMIDOR_FINAL = 99,
}

enum Provincia {
  CIUDAD_AUTONOMA_DE_BUENOS_AIRES = 0,
  BUENOS_AIRES = 1,
  CATAMARCA = 2,
  CORDOBA = 3,
  CORRIENTES = 4,
  ENTRE_RIOS = 5,
  JUJUY = 6,
  MENDOZA = 7,
  LA_RIOJA = 8,
  SALTA = 9,
  SAN_JUAN = 10,
  SAN_LUIS = 11,
  SANTA_FE = 12,
  SANTIAGO_DEL_ESTERO = 13,
  TUCUMAN = 14,
  CHACO = 15,
  CHUBUT = 16,
  FORMOSA = 17,
  MISIONES = 18,
  NEUQUEN = 19,
  LA_PAMPA = 20,
  RIO_NEGRO = 21,
  SANTA_CRUZ = 22,
  TIERRA_DEL_FUEGO = 23,
}
```

## Error handling pattern

```typescript
import { ArcaAuthError, ArcaSoapError, ArcaServiceError, ArcaValidationError } from "@ramiidv/arca-common";

try {
  await wsaa.getAccessTicket("wsfe");
} catch (e) {
  if (e instanceof ArcaValidationError) {
    // Input validation failed
    e.field;    // which field
    e.details;  // [{ field, message, value }]
  }
  if (e instanceof ArcaAuthError) {
    // WSAA authentication failed
  }
  if (e instanceof ArcaServiceError) {
    // ARCA business error
    e.errors;  // [{ code: number, msg: string }]
  }
  if (e instanceof ArcaSoapError) {
    // HTTP/transport error
    e.statusCode;  // number | undefined
  }
}
```

## Retry behavior

Enabled by default (`retries: 1`). Retries on: HTTP 5xx, network errors (TypeError from fetch), AbortError (timeout). Does NOT retry on: 4xx, business errors, validation errors. Backoff formula: `retryDelayMs * 2^(attempt-1)`.

## Key domain concepts

- **WSAA**: Web Service de Autenticacion y Autorizacion. ARCA's auth service using CMS/PKCS#7 signed XML tickets.
- **TRA**: Ticket de Requerimiento de Acceso. XML document signed with the cert/key pair and sent to WSAA.
- **Access Ticket (TA)**: token + sign pair returned by WSAA, valid for a specific service and time window.
- **CUIT/CUIL**: Argentine tax/personal ID numbers (11 digits with weighted checksum).
- **CBU**: Argentine bank account number (22 digits with block checksums).
- **Homologacion**: ARCA's testing/sandbox environment.
